titleStmt.title: SII 8.624: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 624. (A.R. No. 315 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[maṟku yāṇṭu 3 10] vatu cempiya ṉiḷaṅko
veḷāyiṉa pūti Ātittapaṭāraneṉ piramateyam

Īcāṉamaṅkalattut tiruccentuṟaik kaṟṟaḷip parame
śva rarkku paṉaiyūrvāḻkkaiyil kaḻumalattey Uṭum
poṭi Āmai tavaḻntatu puṉceyum meṉceyum Eppe
rppaṭṭa nilam Iṟaiili cantrādi ttaval tevatāṉamāka niroṭu
Aṭṭikkuṭutteṉ cempiya niḷaṅkoveḷāyiṉa pūti Ātittapiṭā
raṉeṉ . Innilattāl tiruccentuṟaik kaṟṟaḷip parameśva rarkku Uṭaiyār
cempiya niḷaṅkoveḷāyiṉa pūti Ātittapaṭārar Aruḷicceyta nivantam cellu
mpaṭi tiruuṇṇāḻikaiyil tirunontāviḷakku nālukku Oṉṟukku kāṟceyāṉapaṭi
nālu tiruviḷakkukku nilam veliyum Ipparameśva rarkku Uṭaiyār cempiya ṉiḷaṅ
koveḷāyiṉa pūti Ātittapiṭārar tiṅkaḷtirunakkattikai ĀṉaRead tirunakṣattiram āṉauttirāṭatti ṉānṟu ne
yyāṭiyaruḷa nāḻi neykkut tūṇi nellāṉapaṭi tiṅkaḷap 10- patiṉāḻi ne[*y]yāl tiṅkaḷ mukkala
ne tūṇi Āṉapaṭi Āṇṭuvarai nūṟṟu Irupati ṉāḻi neyyāl nel cūlakkālāl nā
ṟppatiṉ kalamum Inney yāṭiaruḷiṉa nāṉṟu tiṅkaḷ payaṟṟuppoṉakattukku pata
kkāṟu kuttal paḻavarici Aṟunāḻiyum tūpparuppu Irunāḻiyāl nel kuṟuṇiyum ne
yyamirtu Uriyiṉāl nel patakku vāḻaippaḻam pattiṉāl nel Aiññāḻiyum caṟkarai Amir
tu muppalattiṉāl nel muṉṉāḻiyum porikkaṟi Amirtiṉāl nel Irunāḻiyum
Aṭaikkāyamirtu pattup pākkum teriyilai Oru paṟṟukkum nel
kat tiṅkaḷ tūṇippatak kaṟunāḻiyāṉapaṭi Āṇṭuvarai Aṟukalane yirutūṇi kkuṟu
ṇiāṉapaṭi payaṟṟuppoṉakattukkum neyāṭiaruḷavum
Āṇṭuvarai nāṟppattaṟu kalane Irutūṇi kku
ṟuṇi Innellāl nilam Oṉpatumāk kāṇi
yaraikkāṇiyum yogi kaḷ Iruvar muṉṟu
sandhi yum tiruvārātaṉañ ceyvārkku nicati tūṇiāṉa
paṭi nel nūṟṟuirupatiṉ kalattāl nilam veliyum
pañcamā śabda ttukku Oṉpatu Āḷ koṭṭuvataṟku
IraṇṭeyThis expression is repeated in the next line.
Iraṇṭeykālum cekaṇṭikai Oṉṟukku kālumāka nilam Ai
veliyum cantirāditta val cellumpaṭi nivantam ceytu
kaṟmel veṭṭuvittukkuṭutteṉ cempiya ṉiḷaṅko
veḷāyiṉa pūti Ātittapiṭāraṉeṉ . Itu paṉmāhe
śva ra rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.624 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
